name: hypersolutions
description: Integrate and debug the Hyper Solutions anti-bot API (Akamai, Incapsula, DataDome, Kasada) across the Go, Python, and JS/TS SDKs and raw REST. Bundles a request-debugging workflow: capture traffic via the powhttp MCP or analyze an exported HAR via the har-analyzer MCP, and apply a full rule set for TLS/header/cookie/client-hint fingerprint mistakes.
